series_metadata.series_description: Printout listing all warrants printed by the State Auditor's office for the following: Maintenance (vendors) - printed daily. Payroll - printed daily. Family Care - biweekly until 1979 (No longer used in Mental Health after that date).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 1 year after audit by Auditor of State and after audit report is released, then destroy, Paper: Wastepaper
